references.text: Nickrent, DL, V Malécot, R Vidal-Russell & JP Der. 2010. A revised classification of Santalales. Taxon 59: 538-558
Sleumer, H. 1980. A taxonomic account of the Olacaceae of Asia, Malesia, and the adjacent areas. Blumea 26: 145-168
Sleumer, H. 1984. Olacaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 1-29

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 5 October 2022

species.citation: (Blume) Blume , Mus. Bot. 1 (1851) 251 ; Sleum., Blumea 26 (1980) 150; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1984) 25; ≡ Stemonurus frutescens Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1826) 649; Type: from Java. = Anacolosa luzoniensis Merr. , PJS 4c (1909) 253 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 117; Type: FB 2830 Meyer (PNH, holo, lost; K, L, P, iso), Luzon: Bataan, Mt Mariveles.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nicobar Isls, Philippines, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand. LUZON: Abra, Aurora (photos), Bataan, Batangas, Benguet, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Cavite, Ifugao, Laguna, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, MASBATE, MINDANAO: Surigao del Norte (photos), Zamboanga del Norte, MINDORO, PANAY, SAMAR.
